ranking_rule: Primary: pass the full test suite. Secondary: fewer DMView simulations (lower iteration count).

dmview_suite_run.rationale: Each full DMView suite execution is the dominant cost (one PSS/E dynamic run per test).

gain_update.rationale: Editing the allowed gains is free; only simulations are charged.

budget.note: The baseline suite run is provided by the harness and is not charged against the budget.
